ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game type */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Session status */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the session */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round number of the session */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the session */,
  "swat_kills" INTEGER /* Number of 'swat' kills during the session */,
  "suspects_eliminated" INTEGER /* Number of suspects eliminated during the session */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the map played in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Map size */,
  "map_theme" TEXT /* Map theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was created */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Player's skill level */,
  "preferred_game_mode" TEXT /* Player's preferred game mode */,
  "preferred_game_type" INTEGER /* Player's preferred game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of game sessions played by the player */,
  "total_swat_kills" INTEGER /* Total number of 'swat' kills by the player */,
  "total_suspects_eliminated" INTEGER /* Total number of suspects eliminated by the player */,
  "average_time_per_session" REAL /* Average time taken per session */,
  "average_swat_kills_per_session" REAL /* Average 'swat' kills per session */,
  "average_suspects_eliminated_per_session" REAL /* Average suspects eliminated per session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the achievement */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Achievement type */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Achievement difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player achievement record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the achievement */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress toward achieving the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session */,
  "summary_data" TEXT /* Summary data such as performance metrics as a JSON string */,
  "average_player_performance" REAL /* Average player performance */,
  "session_ranking" INTEGER /* Session ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_summary_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the player */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the admin account was created */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Admin role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Feedback type */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
